title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Posts Record Quarterly Revenue, Beating Estimates
text: Marathon Digital reported record Q3 2025 results that exceeded analyst expectations, validating its operational execution despite industry headwinds. Record Revenue: MARA achieved record quarterly revenue in Q3 2025, beating analyst estimates. Revenue increased 92% year-over-year to $252.4 million. Earnings Beat: Q3 EPS of $0.27 far surpassed the forecasted loss of $0.10, representing a major positive surprise. Bitcoin Position: Bitcoin holdings nearly doubled during the quarter as MARA's HODL strategy paid off with rising bitcoin prices. Liquid Assets: The company ended Q3 2025 with over $7 billion in liquid assets, substantially improving its financial flexibility. Strategic Validation: The earnings beat validated MARA's decision to maintain Bitcoin holdings rather than sell, while simultaneously pursuing its AI infrastructure strategy. Forward Outlook: Strong balance sheet metrics and operational performance provided a solid foundation for continued execution of the Starwood and Long Ridge partnerships announced subsequently.
